_comment: Sanctum Hub app registry. Edit `dir` to point at where each repo is cloned on this machine. `port`/`start` are best-effort defaults — confirm against each app's README. The hub reads this file live; no rebuild needed.

apps.name: Sanctum Engine
apps.description: Shared local-inference engine. Hardware-aware model routing and lifecycle. Every app talks to this.

apps.name: Consilium
apps.description: Multi-model AI council — compare, debate, and verify LLM responses. Runs councils locally with no key.

apps.name: Galatea
apps.description: Local voice AI companion with vision. Python backend + web frontend, loopback-bound.

apps.name: Sanctum Writer
apps.description: AI-assisted markdown editor for writers. Local-first; reads models from the engine.

apps.name: Sanctum Writer Pro
apps.description: Writer with optional commercial cloud providers (BYOK). The privacy boundary is structural — cloud module only in Pro.

apps.name: Sanctum Kanban
apps.description: Multi-team kanban with reflection/retro boards and announcements. Next.js + Postgres.

apps.name: ProcessPulse
apps.description: Educator writing-assessment tool. Grades against rubric criteria with a local model.

apps.name: Sanctum Analyst (ACH)
apps.description: Local-first Analysis of Competing Hypotheses. Structured intelligence analysis powered by local models.

apps.name: TranslaChat
apps.description: Translated chat + collaborative bilingual document workspace.

apps.name: ARDN Global Threat
apps.description: Global threat awareness and analysis environment.

apps.name: EmComm
apps.description: Emergency-communications game: learn to operate radios during grid-down scenarios.
